OmniUiCard.dataSourceConfig: {"dataSource":{"type":"Query","value":{"dsDelay":"","query":"Select Id, Name, Phone, Email from Contact where AccountId = '{recordId}'","jsonMap":"{\"recordId\":\"{recordId}\"}"},"orderBy":{"name":"","isReverse":""},"contextVariables":[{"name":"recordId","val":"001f600000FBucaAAD","id":0}]}}
OmniUiCard.description: Display related Contacts list from the Account record detail page in a Flex Card embeded in an OS component by passing the Record Id of the Account record to the Flex Card
OmniUiCard.name: AccountContactList_RecordPage_FromOS
